data.title: Elon Musk Breaks Internet With Shiba Inu Video, Here's How Dogecoin and SHIB Meme Coins React
data.description:
Elon Musk’s unexpected Shiba video pushed Dogecoin, SHIB and Floki back into focus as traders paused to interpret why the Tesla founder decided to drop it without any context.
source: https://u.today/elon-musk-breaks-internet-with-shiba-inu-video-heres-how-dogecoin-and-shib-meme-coins-react

data.title: After CZ posted his ASTER trades, a whale that had shorted ASTER closed out 4.79 million ASTER tokens, making a profit of $860,000, and held $213 million in long positions in ETH and XRP.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a whale that shorted $50.62 million worth of ASTER at $1.20 after CZ posted his ASTER holdings, closed out 4.79 million ASTER at $1.02 in the past half hour, realizing a profit of $860,000. Its open positions still have a floating profit of $6.19 million. In addition, this whale also holds long positions in ETH and XRP worth $213 million, currently showing a floating loss of $9.9 million. This address previously held short positions but closed them out to take profits and switched to long positions after the market decline on November 5th.

data.title: Google hit with €573 million payout in German antitrust cases
data.description:
A court in Berlin has told Google to hand over €573 million to two German websites that compare prices online. The ruling came after the companies claimed they lost business because of how the search giant ran its operations. The Berlin Regional Court made the decision on Thursday evening, but only made it public Friday […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/google-hit-with-e573-million-payout/

data.title: Crypto stocks opened lower across the board, with BitMine down 9.86%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 1.65%, the S&P 500 fell 1.66%, and the Nasdaq fell 2.29%. The crypto sector generally declined, with Circle falling 4.59%, BitMine falling 9.86%, and Coinbase falling 6.86%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitfarms-bitcoin-to-ai/

data.title: FASB considers formal rules for crypto asset transfers
data.description:
The Financial Accounting Standards Board (FASB) is reportedly considering establishing rules for cryptocurrency asset transfers to enhance financial reporting and provide clarity in the space. Notably, the independent nonprofit organization arrived at this decision after noticing that regulations for recognizing and reporting cryptocurrencies were unclear. This resulted in the inaccuracy of financial reports, according to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/fasb-weighs-formal-crypto-transfer-rules/

data.title: Gate launches pre-market trading of SENT perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate has now launched pre-market trading of SENT perpetual contracts (USDT settlement), supporting leverage of 1-10x.

data.title: Market Volatility Increases Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description: According to PANews, the foreign exchange market experienced heightened volatility on Friday as stock markets faced a sell-off, prompting investors to seek safe-haven assets. A report indicating that the UK's budget this month will not raise income taxes further pressured the British pound. The market is currently influenced by multiple intersecting factors, with the primary reason being traders' belief that the likelihood of a Federal Reserve rate cut in December is now much lower than anticipated weeks ago. More Federal Reserve officials have expressed caution overnight, showing reluctance towards further easing due to inflation concerns and signs of a relatively stable labor market. This shift in expectations triggered a sell-off in high-valuation U.S. stocks and government bonds, which spread to Asian and European markets. In the foreign exchange market, this led to a flow of funds towards the Swiss franc and the Japanese yen. The latest market data shows the U.S. dollar fell by 0.5% against both the Swiss franc and the Japanese yen.

data.title: SEC's New Guidelines May Expedite Cryptocurrency ETF Approvals
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Bloomberg's senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas reported that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has issued new guidelines that appear to allow issuers to expedite the effectiveness of their filing processes. This move aims to clear the backlog of pending projects more swiftly.

Balchunas speculates that cryptocurrency ETFs, which have not yet completed the 8a process, will likely accelerate their efforts to advance. Bitwise's XRP ETF is expected to be next in line for approval.

data.title: US inflation data goes dark: Shutdown wipes out October CPI, leaving Bitcoin hanging
data.description:
For months, crypto traders have timed leverage, funding, and liquidity around the monthly U. S. inflation print. This week, those who had hoped the recent vote to reopen the government would bring new macro data were disappointed to find nothing on the tape
source: https://cryptoslate.com/cpi-goes-dark-shutdown-wipes-out-october-cpi-leaving-bitcoin-hanging/

data.title: Bitcoin Slides to $98K as Nearly $658M in Liquidations Hammer the Crypto Market
data.description:
Bitcoin's value has dipped to $98,000 following a significant wave of liquidations that wiped out nearly $658 million in positions, exerting downward pressure on the overall crypto market. This dramatic decline highlights the volatility inherent in cryptocurrency trading, as traders react to market fluctuations, leading to forced sell-offs and contributing to an overall bearish sentiment across various digital assets.
source: https://blocknews.com/bitcoin-slides-to-98k-as-nearly-658m-in-liquidations-hammer-the-crypto-market/
